title: Debugging TanStack Store: When Your React App Crashes Before It Renders
summary: A TanStack Store implementation that looked correct, compiled without errors, and crashed spectacularly in the browser. The story of fixing `atom?.get is not a function` and learning to read documentation carefully.
body: # Debugging TanStack Store: When Your React App Crashes Before It Renders
heroImageAlt: A terminal window showing a stack trace with TanStack Store error, overlaid with code snippets
author: Nicolas Brulay
